---
title: "Kernels"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Kernels}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
if (requireNamespace("pkgload", quietly = TRUE)) {
  pkgload::load_all(quiet = TRUE, helpers = FALSE)
} else {
  library(DPmixGPD)
}
library(nimble)

# Make package helpers available even when the namespace is only loaded
build_nimble_bundle <- getFromNamespace("build_nimble_bundle", "DPmixGPD")
run_mcmc_bundle_manual <- getFromNamespace("run_mcmc_bundle_manual", "DPmixGPD")

# Locate datasets when pkgdown builds without installing the package
resolve_data_file <- function(filename) {
  candidates <- c(
    file.path("data", filename),
    file.path("..", "data", filename),
    file.path("..", "..", "data", filename)
  )
  existing <- candidates[file.exists(candidates)]
  if (length(existing) == 0) stop(sprintf("Data file %s not found", filename))
  existing[[1]]
}

# Helper functions
print_dataset_header <- function(data, name = deparse(substitute(data))) {
  cat(sprintf("Dataset: %s (n=%d", name, length(data$y)))
  if (!is.null(data$X)) cat(sprintf(", p=%d", ncol(data$X)))
  cat(")\n")
  invisible(NULL)
}

default_mcmc <- function() {
  list(niter = 1000, nburnin = 500, nchains = 2, thin = 1, seed = 1)
}
```

## Real-line kernels

```{r realline-data-load}
load(resolve_data_file("nc_real200_k2.rda"), envir = environment())
print_dataset_header(nc_real200_k2, "nc_real200_k2")
```

```{r realline-model-spec}
real_kernels <- c("normal", "laplace", "cauchy")
backends <- c("crp", "sb")
mcmc <- default_mcmc()
```

```{r realline-fit-mcmc, eval=TRUE}
for (ker in real_kernels) {
  for (backend in backends) {
    bundle <- build_nimble_bundle(
      y = nc_real200_k2$y,
      backend = backend,
      kernel = ker,
      GPD = FALSE,
      components = nc_real200_k2$meta$K_true,
      mcmc = mcmc
    )
    summary(bundle)
    fit <- run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle, show_progress = FALSE)
    summary(fit)
  }
}
```

## Positive-support kernels

```{r possupp-data-load}
load(resolve_data_file("nc_pos200_k3.rda"), envir = environment())
print_dataset_header(nc_pos200_k3, "nc_pos200_k3")
```

```{r possupp-model-spec}
pos_kernels <- c("gamma", "lognormal", "invgauss", "amoroso")
backends <- c("crp", "sb")
mcmc <- default_mcmc()
```

```{r possupp-fit-mcmc, eval=TRUE}
for (ker in pos_kernels) {
  for (backend in backends) {
    bundle <- build_nimble_bundle(
      y = nc_pos200_k3$y,
      backend = backend,
      kernel = ker,
      GPD = FALSE,
      components = nc_pos200_k3$meta$K_true,
      mcmc = mcmc
    )
    summary(bundle)
    fit <- run_mcmc_bundle_manual(bundle, show_progress = FALSE)
    summary(fit)
  }
}
```
